title: Eden Classic delivers style and speed
description: SEDGEFIELD NEWS - The Eden Classic Car and...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"SEDGEFIELD NEWS - The Eden Classic Car and Motorcycle Show, held recently in Sedgefield as part of the Knysna Oyster Festival, was a resounding success.","html":"SEDGEFIELD NEWS - The Eden Classic Car and Motorcycle Show, held recently in Sedgefield as part of the Knysna Oyster Festival, was a resounding success."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Over 2 000 visitors attended the event, drawn by a remarkable display of more than 200 cars and 40 motorcycles - and the welcomed absence of rain despite prior warnings."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Organiser Peter Pretorius praised the turnout, noting the focus on supercars and performance vehicles, alongside a rich selection of traditional classic sports cars.","html":"Organiser Peter Pretorius praised the turnout, noting the focus on supercars and performance vehicles, alongside a rich selection of traditional classic sports cars."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read more in this week's edition of the Knysna Plett Herald.","html":"Read more in this week's edition of the Knysna Plett Herald."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Eden Classic delivers style and speed
